title: 慢慢生活
scene: 吊床、植物影子与午后空气构成松弛背景，中央加入中文文案“今天不赶路 / 只感受生活”。
prompt: Create one premium vertical wallpaper for category 文字 / 躺平 with an indoor hammock, plant shadows, a side table, soft afternoon air, and a calm center text area. author: OpenAI Codex
copy:
